target: WIN-044 (id=044): purely→primarily geometric fix in detail_evidence; OBE resolution for unit and formula issues

obe_resolutions.reason: Unit inconsistency alleged to affect "technical-source paragraph" restating BOU shift without km units. Verification: current detail_evidence reads "BOU shifts from r = 5,715 km (V50.6) to r = 9,983 km (V51)" — km units ARE present in every occurrence. OBE.
Duplicate of ISS-1680. Same km-units check performed: units present. OBE.
Duplicate unit check (ISS-1773 = ISS-1680 = ISS-1712 filed at different cycle). Verification confirms km present in all occurrences. OBE.

ΔB vs ΔZ: ISS says detail_evidence uses "ΔB = baseline × coverage × FSF" but dome publishes delta_Z. Verification: current detail_evidence uses "ΔZ = baseline × coverage × FSF" — already correct. OBE.
Duplicate of ISS-1681. ΔZ already in text. OBE.
Duplicate of ISS-1681 (formula notation). Current text uses ΔZ. OBE.

ISS says detail_evidence cites dome formula as "ΔB = b·exp(-r/d)·z/|z|". This formula does not appear in current detail_evidence at all. The text cites only "ΔZ = baseline × coverage × FSF". OBE — the formula phrasing this ISS was filed against is not present.

patches.description: WIN-044 detail_evidence: Change "purely geometric" to "primarily geometric" because H(r) in V51 uses exponentially-fitted parameters (8537 × exp(-r/8619)), meaning the FSF ratio has a physical-parameter dependency, not a pure geometric one. The FSF is dominated by geometry but not exclusively determined by it.
patches.replace_pattern: — primarily geometric (H(r) uses fitted physical parameters, so FSF carries a mild parameter dependence, but the ratio structure is dominated by geometry).

tldr_evidence: WIN-044 wording: 7 ISS OBE'd (ISS-1680/1712/1773 — km units already present; ISS-1681/1713/1774 — ΔZ not ΔB already in text; ISS-1722 — disputed formula not in current text). One patch: "purely geometric" → "primarily geometric" with parenthetical noting H(r) parameter dependence.
tldr_verdict: Minor precision improvement only. No verdict change. Seven confirmed OBEs.
